texto: Unfortunately, the young generation, who I believe have their own place in the sun like I had mine; but I wish it was possible there were other ways to have them understand this music was here before they came, and the reason that it was here.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ruth Brown: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Unfortunately, the young generation, who I believe have their own place in the sun like I had min…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, sun, believe pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de believe e i-believe.
